title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at Scripbox Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at Scripbox Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Scripbox Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scripbox Holdings Services:
Scripbox Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scripbox Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
